5:
Your plans to defend the riverboat are soon tested as Bakool Ja Ja releases wild creatures from his own barge to harass and harry you. Aggravated by your prowess, the two-head then turns his attention to your punutiy, wounding the creature and damaging the front of your vessel. Erenville is thus forced to ground the boat while you scout on ahead.

A perilous detour through an abandoned Yok Huy mine sees you encounter Koana and his entourage─yet while the meeting does not come to blows, they delay your progress nonetheless. Eventually, you emerge near the river, where you are rejoined by Erenville, Alisaie, and the recovered punutiy.

Your group sets off again, and presently arrives at Dock Tumu. Encouraged to let her guard down by you and your companions, it seems Wuk Lamat has much to think about as you make for the nearby mountain camp...

Your group sets off again and presently arrives at Dock Tumu. Encouraged to let her guard down by you and your companions, it seems Wuk Lamat has much to think about as you make for the nearby mountain camp...

7: An innocent question from Alisaie prompts Wuk Lamat to tell the story of her childhood with Gulool Ja Ja, culminating with the inadequacy she feels when compared to her accomplished brothers. With the aid of you and Krile, however, the Third Promise comes to better understand what it is that truly drives her. She resolves to continue her journey, and to learn more of her beloved nation and its peoples as she walks a path of her own making.
